description: Establishes the omp-flow methodology and deterministic control-plane release lineage.
changelog: Canonical omp-flow repository cutover with harness-neutral Claude, Codex, and OMP adapters plus synchronized core and CLI packages.
migrationGuide: Version 0.2.0 starts the omp-flow methodology lineage and is unrelated to the previously published omp-flow 0.1.x package lineage. Do not update an existing 0.1.x installation in place. Create a fresh project checkout or remove the foreign 0.1.x-managed files, then run omp-flow init and select the required harness adapters.
aiInstructions: Treat 0.1.x as an unrelated package lineage. Preserve user-owned files, do not infer compatible managed hashes from 0.1.x, and guide the user through a fresh omp-flow init followed by project-specific configuration review.
notes: Fresh initialization is required when coming from the unrelated 0.1.x package lineage.
